message:
fix(test262): Use AOT compilation for EdgeBox testing

Add AOT compilation step and pass AOT file to EdgeBox in test262 runner.

Changes:
1. Build edgeboxc (AOT compiler) in CI workflow
2. Compile edgebox-base.wasm to AOT after building
3. Update test262 runner to pass AOT file path for EdgeBox engine

This fixes the "Failed to initialize WAMR runtime" errors where EdgeBox
was trying to load .js files directly instead of running them through
the WASM/AOT module.

Expected results:
- EdgeBox pass rate should improve from 59.2% to ~92% (matching QJS)
- Performance should be even faster than current 30s with AOT

files.patch:
@@ -55,8 +55,14 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           zig build wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
           zig build runner -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
+          zig build build-cli -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
           zig build test262 -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
 
+      - name: Compile EdgeBox WASM to AOT
+        run: |
+          zig-out/bin/edgeboxc compile zig-out/bin/edgebox-base.wasm \
+            -o zig-out/bin/edgebox-base.aot
+
       - name: Build QuickJS-NG
         working-directory: vendor/quickjs-ng
         run: make
